title: The 4% DGI Core Portfolio: 2022 Year-End Review

title: Three 3%+ Yielders With 20 Consecutive Years Of Dividend Growth
text: A company increasing its dividend in each of the past 20 years is no small task, especially given that the period includes the Great Financial Crisis and the COVID-19 meltdown. Entities that have been paying dividends have experienced resilient performance during the past 12-18 months, and this will likely continue in the coming quarters.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.
